## What does this PR do?

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (`python -m unittest discover -s tests`)
- [ ] `comfy-lock selftest` passes
- [ ] `ruff check comfylock tests panel` is clean
- [ ] `mypy comfylock` is clean
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `README.md` / `docs/` updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] Zero-dependency core preserved (new deps live behind an optional extra)
- [ ] Backward-compatible with existing v1/v2 lockfiles
